title: UnitySMP NL
description: This is the official modpack used on Unity's hardcore SMP server
body:
# UnitySMP Hardcore Modpack
This modpack is designed for the official Hardcore SMP Community Server. It includes only the essential mods needed for smooth performance, stable gameplay, and clear communication without changing the core vanilla survival experience.

## HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for UnitySMP NL and click install
3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!

### CREDITS:

This pack includes resources from Vanilla Tweaks. You can find their work at https://vanillatweaks.net
